---
description: "Use when doing external research for design or content decisions."
---

# Research Quality (Simple Mode)

## Minimum Source Rule
Use at least 2 independent sources for important decisions.

## Record Rule
When using external info, record:
- Source URL
- Date checked
- What was used
- Why it was used

## Reject Sources That Are
- Clearly outdated
- Unsourced opinion presented as fact
- Not related to the actual decision
